mapper.insert: insert into customer_service_session(user_id, source, status, last_message, last_message_time, create_time, update_time, closed_time) values(#{userId}, #{source}, #{status}, #{lastMessage}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{closedTime})
mapper.select: select * from customer_service_session where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1 order by id desc limit 1

select s.id, s.user_id as userId, u.name as userName, s.source, s.status, s.last_message as lastMessage, s.last_message_time as lastMessageTime, coalesce(sum(case when m.sender_type = 'user' and m.read_status = 0 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as unreadCount, s.create_time as createTime, s.update_time as updateTime from customer_service_session s left join user u on u.id = s.user_id left join customer_service_message m on m.session_id = s.id
and s.status = #{status}
and ( u.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or s.last_message like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or cast(s.user_id as char) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
group by s.id, s.user_id, u.name, s.source, s.status, s.last_message, s.last_message_time, s.create_time, s.update_time order by case when s.status = 1 then 0 else 1 end, ifnull(s.last_message_time, s.update_time) desc, s.id desc
